zh.lifeSummary: 當William Tilley於1515年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，他的父親Thomas Tilley25歲，母親Margaret Cunliffe25歲。他於大約1534年與Agnes Nightengale Cowper在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1579年1月21日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾亨洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Tilley于1515年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，他的父亲Thomas Tilley25岁，母亲Margaret Cunliffe25岁。他于大约1534年与Agnes Nightengale Cowper在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1579年1月21日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾亨洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William Tilley was born in 1515, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Tilley, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Cunliffe, was 25. He married Agnes Nightengale Cowper about 1534, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 January 1579, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Tilley est né en 1515, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Tilley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cunliffe, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Nightengale Cowper environ 1534, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1579, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Tilley 1515 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Tilley 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Cunliffe 25. Er hat um 1534 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Nightengale Cowper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1579 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Tilley è nato il nel 1515 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Tilley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cunliffe, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Nightengale Cowper circa 1534, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1579, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Henlow, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Tilleyが1515年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Tilleyは25歳，母Margaret Cunliffeは25歳であった。約1534年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウでAgnes Nightengale Cowperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1579年1月21日に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Tilley(이)가 1515년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Tilley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cunliffe(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 Agnes Nightengale Cowper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1579년 1월 21일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Tilley nasceu em 1515, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Tilley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cunliffe, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Nightengale Cowper aproximadamente 1534, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1579, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Tilley родился в 1515 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Tilley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cunliffe, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Nightengale Cowper около 1534 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 января 1579 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Tilley nació en 1515, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Tilley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Cunliffe, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes Nightengale Cowper aproximadamente 1534, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1579, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
